hero.title: A Guided Journey Through Ramadan
hero.description: Build consistency in worship, reflection, and community through a structured daily program.

journeyTracks.title: Quran Reflection
journeyTracks.description: Daily reflection sessions focused on meaning, context, and action.

journeyTracks.title: Character Building
journeyTracks.description: Practical reminders to improve sincerity, discipline, and adab.

journeyTracks.title: Family and Community
journeyTracks.description: Shared learning tracks for homes, youth circles, and local groups.

testimonials.name: Amina K.
testimonials.quote: This format made it easy for our whole family to stay connected to daily Islamic learning.

testimonials.name: Yusuf R.
testimonials.quote: The short daily reminders were practical and helped me stay disciplined throughout Ramadan.

faq.question: Do I need to attend every live session?
faq.answer: No. You can attend live and catch up later through the video library.

faq.question: Can families use this as a shared program?
faq.answer: Yes. The track and schedule format is designed for individual and family participation.

faq.question: How do I get notified about updates?
faq.answer: Use the subscribe section to receive reminders and new content alerts.

subscribe.title: Stay Updated Throughout Ramadan
subscribe.description: Receive reminders and updates when new bayan videos are added.

footer.note: Content is managed from public/site-content.json and public/videos.json.
